description: Baseline: D1 query performance on remote workout-dev-db. Using wrangler CLI to measure sql_duration_ms. Exercises list query p95=485ms, workouts list p95=1079ms, volume p95=1798ms.

asi.note: High latency due to wrangler CLI network overhead. Relative improvements still valid for optimization experiments.
asi.next_actions: Analyze query plans, add missing indexes, optimize JOINs
